identity_boundary.evidence_basis: visible user declaration in this conversation

excluded_claims: complete formalization or reverse engineering of all mathematics, physics, logic, metaphysics, spirituality or the universe
empirical confirmation beyond the persisted evidence
recovery of information lost by a non-injective observation

risk.reason: Zenodo finalization creates an immutable public version and remains separately marker-gated.

authorized_process.reserve: one pristine new-version draft derived from published source record 21501365, without metadata/file mutation or publication during reserve
authorized_process.finalize: only the separately marker-bound and MAC-bound reserved draft, after all fail-closed gates

non_effect.workflow_hmac_boundary: The HMAC is an internal integrity check using the Actions-held Zenodo token; it is not a publicly verifiable signature or an identity proof.
